step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in bold white sans-serif text centered at the top of a gradient background that transitions from grey to teal. The C has a solid navy blue circle partially behind it, but no regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in bold white sans-serif text centered at the top of a gradient background that transitions from grey to teal. The C has a solid navy blue circle partially behind it, but no regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: top center
  Text colour: white
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: navy blue (matches #242c65)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (correct on gradient backgrounds — halo uses secondary colour per LOGO-02)
  Gradient colours: navy blue
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: gradient
  Colours: grey (#9d9fa1) at top fading to teal (#89d0c8) at bottom
  Gradient direction: top-to-bottom
  Description: A smooth gradient from grey at the top to teal at the bottom

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: white, navy blue, grey, teal
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: dominant element (teal in gradient background)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image displays the ZONNIC logo in bold white sans-serif text centered at the top of a gradient background that transitions from grey at the top to teal at the bottom. The C has a solid navy blue circle partially behind it, which is correctly positioned and proportioned. The logo is visually clear, with sufficient space around it and no distortion or modification. However, the image is missing all required regulatory elements: there is no bilingual nicotine warning at the top, no 18+ age restriction icon, and no risk communication text at the bottom. These omissions are critical regulatory failures and must be addressed for compliance. The logo and background otherwise follow brand guidelines, but the absence of regulatory text and icons makes this asset non-compliant for marketing use.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
No 18+ age restriction icon is present anywhere in the image.
No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is present and clearly visible at the top center.
Logo text is white, which is acceptable for a gradient background with dark top.
The C has a circular halo, correctly placed and proportioned, with no distortion or outline.
Logo is unmodified, with no gradients in text, outlines, or stacking.
Background is a gradient from grey to teal, matching the Grey/Neutral flavour palette.
Gradient flows top-to-bottom with correct colour split and logo positioned above the 20% line.
Logo-only content uses a gradient background, which is acceptable for brand visuals.
All colours used are from the approved Grey/Neutral flavour palette.
Bold sans-serif font is used, matching the Santral typeface requirement.
Grey gradient is used correctly as part of the gradient background.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it, with no elements intruding.
Halo does not blend into the background, and there are no flavour mismatches or logo in shapes.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image, including both English and French text.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is present anywhere in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image to indicate age restriction.
violations.evidence: No age icon detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No risk text detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, 18+ icon, risk text) are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and the 18+ icon and risk communication at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory elements detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: On white or light backgrounds, the ZONNIC text must be navy blue.
violations.issue: The logo text is white on a gradient background — it should be navy blue.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the logo text colour to navy blue (#242c65) for light backgrounds.
violations.evidence: Brand detection found logo text colour is 'white' on a 'gradient' background.
